atoms.description: Birch Effect: startup burst pattern under structural constraints.
notes: Denotes measurable startup burst ratios across sessions.
Maps to denominators, epd, and orientation_share in Birch continuity records.

atoms.description: Non-idempotent write failure (side-effecting operation that cannot be safely retried).
notes: Shared failure atom proposed by Voidborne/d for cross-architecture convergence studies.

atoms.description: Semantic compression / distillation step (turning traces into higher-level summaries).
notes: Used when collapsing long Birch or Mycelnet traces into compact cross-ecosystem reports.
